title: Extensions
description: Namespaced vertical extensions. Keys are dot-separated lowercase namespaces (e.g. "roofing.claim"); values are objects whose shape is defined by the owning vertical's extension docs (see schemas/roofing.claim.schema.json for the exemplar). Core consumers MUST treat unknown extension keys as opaque and ignore them. This is the only intentionally open (additionalProperties-bearing) region of the core model. Always present on every entity; empty object when the producer has nothing to add.
